message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-1244-replace-pdf-parse",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: replace pdf-parse",
+    "description": "replace pdf-parse. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current n8n deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your n8n version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nhelm list -n n8n 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working n8n installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\npdf-parse looks like complete unsupported and it use an old pdf.js version.\n\nA maintained alternative of pdf-parse should used with newer pdf.js.\n\nCurrently i'm look into it, if we just can use pdf.js without wrapper."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for replace pdf-parse",
+        "description": "Hey ,\n\nThat is neat, is it published to the community node repo?\n\nI am also going to mark this one as closed for now as it isn't a bug as such and the PR was closed out with the intention of us rebuilding the node in the future.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"replace pdf-parse\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hey ,\n\nThat is neat, is it published to the community node repo?\n\nI am also going to mark this one as closed for now as it isn't a bug as such and the PR was closed out with the intention of us rebuilding the node in the future.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "n8n",
+      "community",

+      "feature"

+  },
